visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three young females stand in an indoor room with a gray floor. The central figure wears a long light-blue shirt-dress, dark socks, and black chunky shoes. They perform a synchronized dance involving rhythmic side-to-side steps and hand rotations. Behind them are tall wooden cabinets and a large whiteboard. (2) A young male in a white long-sleeved shirt and a young female in a blue shirt-dress dance on a concrete patio in front of a school building. A large green banner with white text is visible above them. Several people stand on a balcony in the background, observing or filming. The lighting is bright natural daylight. (3) A female in a blue shirt-dress stands between two young males in an outdoor lot. One male wears a black sweatshirt, and the other wears a gray zip-up hoodie. They perform the same rhythmic hand and foot movements. In the background, four large yellow and green transit buses are parked side-by-side under a clear blue sky. (4) A large group of young females stands on wide concrete stairs outside a building. The central figure in the blue shirt-dress leads the dance while the others in the background perform various gestures. Many students are seen walking and standing in the background area. The sun creates high contrast and deep shadows on the ground. (5) A single female in a blue shirt-dress dances alone in the center of a large, empty asphalt parking lot. She moves with high energy, smiling while pointing her hands and shifting her weight. The background features distant trees, parked cars under a canopy, and city buildings against a bright, clear sky.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a wide shot at the entrance of Katsuō-ji Temple. A mother dressed in a beige trench coat and two young boys wearing colorful fuzzy jackets wave enthusiastically at the camera in front of a large stone monument with Japanese inscriptions. The background features dense green hedges and a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. (2) A transition leads into a vibrant montage of red Daruma dolls of various sizes stacked on wooden shelves. One of the boys, wearing glasses and a yellow-blue fleece, gazes in awe at the display. The camera pans across the traditional temple architecture, showing the intricate red wooden pillars and tiled roofs under soft, natural daylight. (3) The family enters the temple grounds, passing by a ticketing sign. They walk through a grand red gate toward a bridge over a scenic pond. The mother is seen filming and taking photos while the children explore the pebble-covered paths. Many other tourists are visible in the background, adding to the lively atmosphere of the religious site. (4) The mother and one son participate in a stamp-collecting activity. They use a large wooden stamp to mark a postcard at one of the temple's designated stations. Close-up shots highlight the mother's hand with a ring pressing the stamp and the child's focused expression. (5) The scene shifts to the interior of the temple's souvenir shop. The shelves are packed with red-themed merchandise, including bags, snacks, and plush toys. The mother shows off a shopping basket overflowing with souvenirs, laughing and talking toward the camera. (6) The final phase is a rapid slideshow of still photos showing the family posing at iconic spots: in front of a red bridge, near stone lanterns, and sticking their heads through a Daruma-themed cutout board. The lighting remains bright and natural throughout.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a hand with red nail polish holding a red package of noodles against a white kitchen background. A pair of wooden chopsticks is used to submerge the noodles completely. (4) In a blue and white patterned ceramic bowl, a hand cracks a brown egg. The yellow yolk and clear whites fall into the bowl alongside two previously cracked eggs. The camera remains at a close-up angle. (5) A liquid from a white sachet is poured into the bowl with the eggs. A pair of chopsticks is then used to whisk the eggs and liquid together with rapid circular motions until well combined. (6) The boiled white noodles are lifted out of the pot and placed directly into the bowl of beaten egg mixture. The noodles are then tossed with the chopsticks to ensure each strand is thoroughly coated in yellow liquid. (7) A white spray bottle is used to apply oil to the surface of a black non-stick frying pan. The pan is sitting on an induction cooktop. The lighting remains bright and natural. (8) The noodle and egg mixture is poured from the blue bowl into the heated pan. The mixture spreads out into a circular shape. Chopsticks are used to level the surface and distribute the noodles evenly across the pan. (9) A white silicone spatula is used to lift the edge of the pancake, checking for doneness. The pancake is then flipped over, revealing a crispy, golden-brown crust. The sound of sizzling is implied by the visual of small bubbles. (10) The final cooked pancake is presented on a dark brown plate placed on a light wood surface. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit indoor room with a minimalist aesthetic, five young women are standing in a horizontal line. The central woman is wearing a black t-shirt with 'HAHABABY' text and light blue pants, while the others wear varying casual street-style outfits in black, white, and beige. They perform a synchronized dance movement involving placing their hands under their chins. Cartoon chicken heads with red combs appear above their heads. (2) The scene cuts rapidly between individual shots of the women. Each woman performs the same gesture: first a chin-tuck 'chicken' pose, then a 'banana' pose where they form a triangle with their hands above their heads. Yellow banana graphics float across the screen. (3) The entire group returns to the frame, continuing the dance. Suddenly, the synchronization breaks as they all burst into intense laughter. They begin to move chaotically, bumping into one another and leaning over in fits of giggles. (4) The setting shifts to a dressing room with large mirrors framed by vanity lights and racks of colorful clothes. The main woman in blue pants is seen practicing. Then, the group is shown in a narrow hallway area, attempting the dance again before collapsing into laughter, with one woman nearly falling over from laughing so hard. (5) A final shot shows one of the women in a black dress alone in the room, attempting the 'banana' pose before crouching down and covering her face while laughing hysterically.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black oversized T-shirt with the white text 'HAHABABY' and denim shorts, stands in a bright white room. She holds the T-shirt out in front of her to display its size and logo. Behind her is a window with natural light and a wooden cabinet. (2) The woman transitions to wearing a cream-colored 'HAHABABY' T-shirt over a white lace skirt and long white mesh sleeves. She holds a small basket filled with orange and yellow artificial flowers while smiling at the camera in a room with a grey sofa and wooden dresser. (3) She appears in a casual outfit, wearing the same cream T-shirt paired with white wide-leg jeans and a light green baseball cap. She demonstrates a styling trick by using a black rubber band to tie a side knot on the shirt's hem, tucking the knot inward to shorten the garment. (4) The woman now wears the cream T-shirt layered over a blue striped long-sleeved shirt and a denim mini-skirt. She wears a brown cap and her hair is styled in two low ponytails. She ties small knots on both sides of the shirt's hem using rubber bands to create a layered, preppy look. (5) In an edgy style, she wears a black 'HAHABABY' T-shirt over black mesh sleeves and wide-leg denim jeans with white stitching. She wears a black beanie with a small white graphic. She poses with her arms crossed, showing off the textured sleeves. (6) For the final look, she wears the black T-shirt with denim shorts and a black beret. She has a light blue sweater draped diagonally across her chest and tied over one shoulder. She tucks a small portion of the shirt hem into her shorts to create an asymmetrical silhouette. (7) The video concludes with a rapid montage of all five previous outfits, showing the woman posing and smiling in each different style against the same indoor background.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video with graphic-style text overlays. A woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a green and white horizontal striped oversized long-sleeved shirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor nursery. The room has white closets and wooden shelves filled with light blue storage bins. Colorful toys, including a blue plush animal and a Spider-Man doll, are scattered across the light-colored wooden floor. A large red graphic with black text appears above her as she looks at the mess with an annoyed facial expression. (2) The camera follows the woman as she accidentally trips over a blue plush toy, her body lurching forward towards a wooden desk area. She grimaces and reaches her hand to her head. She then walks through a white hallway, picking up a small teal toy from the floor. She proceeds to crouch under a white table to retrieve another item, bumping her head against the underside and showing physical distress through squinted eyes and a hand clutching her forehead. (3) The scene shifts to a brightly lit bathroom with beige tiles and a large mirror. The woman stands before a white sink, wearing the same striped shirt. She looks intensely at her reflection, lifting a section of hair at her crown with her hand to reveal several grey hair strands at the roots. Her mouth is slightly open in a look of concern and realization as she examines the silver hairs. (4) In the bathroom, the woman holds a red and white box of CIELO hair dye. She has put on clear plastic gloves and a grey towel draped over her shoulders. She uses her thumb to press the white nozzle of a red and white pressurized bottle, dispensing two ribbons of cream—one yellow and one white—directly onto the bristles of a red plastic hairbrush. (5) The woman applies the cream-covered brush to her hair roots at the forehead and temples. She uses her gloved hands to massage the product into her dark hair, ensuring full coverage from the scalp outward. Several shots show her rubbing the thick white cream through different sections of her hair. She maintains a focused and eventually satisfied expression throughout the process. (6) The setting changes to a clean, well-lit room with a white table. The woman now wears a beige cropped sweatshirt and matching pants. Her hair is dark, shiny, and neatly styled, with no visible grey roots. She stands behind several boxes of the hair dye product, gesturing towards her hair and the packaging with an enthusiastic smile and energetic hand movements. (7) A close-up shot focuses on the woman's scalp and hair roots as she parts her hair with her fingers. The roots are uniformly dark, showing the successful application of the dye without any patches of grey. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the texture and refreshed color of the hair. (8) The woman stands in front of the camera, holding two boxes of the hair dye and the red bottle. She raises her fist in an encouraging gesture while smiling broadly at the viewer. The background is a simple, modern interior. Overlays with lists of different hair color shades and text continue to appear as she gestures toward them.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, frustrated female vocal sigh followed by a high-pitched, annoyed exclamation in Taiwanese Mandarin. The vocal delivery has a sharp pitch contour and high arousal. There is no background music, only the clean, high-fidelity recording of the voice. (2) A loud, percussive thud sound effect with a broad spectral bandwidth occurs, indicating a physical impact or trip. The woman follows this with a low-volume, strained groan. The acoustic texture is dominated by the sudden transient of the impact followed by the vocal reaction. (3) Rhythmic, high-frequency 'ding' and 'slide' sound effects are heard as objects are moved. These are clearly stylized post-production SFX used to punctuate actions. The sound of soft footsteps on a hard floor provides a low-level ambient texture. (4) Another sudden, dull thud sound effect triggers, followed by a sharper 'clack' as if a head has hit a wooden surface. The woman groans again, her voice displaying a mix of pain and frustration with a falling intonation. (5) A sharp, high-pitched 'ding' sound effect, common in variety shows to indicate a realization, occurs. The woman's breathing is slightly audible, indicating a close-mic field recording quality with high tonal purity. (6) An upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic-pop background music (BGM) enters abruptly. The BGM features a bright, major-mode tonality with a clear acoustic guitar rhythm and a steady percussion beat at approximately 120 BPM. A female vocalist in the BGM sings in a light style. (7) A distinct mechanical clicking sound occurs twice in rapid succession as a pressurized nozzle is depressed. The sound is crisp with a narrow frequency range. The narrator continues her clear, enunciated delivery over the ongoing BGM. (8) The sound of a brush moving through hair creates a soft, friction-based rustling noise. This is layered under the narrator's enthusiastic speech and the rhythmic BGM. The audio mix maintains a high signal-to-noise ratio. (9) The BGM swells slightly in volume during a transition. The narrator's voice reaches a high valence and arousal, concluding the video with an energetic call to action. The final second features a quick fade-out of the music and a final vocal peak.

(7) Another round of electronic countdown beeps occurs. The acoustic environment exhibits clean indoor room characteristics with minimal background noise. (8) A final camera shutter SFX plays, followed by the toddler's soft vocalizations and adult voices laughing in a humorous tone. The music maintains its groove until the very end of the clip.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, mid-tempo electronic pop background track begins. An adult female voice speaks warmly, initiated by a sharp 'ding' sound effect. The BGM features a steady synth pulse and a clean electronic beat. (2) A young child's voice responds with a high pitch and playful cadence. A 'whoosh' transition sound effect punctuates the shift as the woman introduces the books. The BGM volume remains consistent in the background. (3) A professional adult male narrator's voice enters, speaking with high clarity and enthusiasm. A 'click' and 'sliding' SFX are heard as the spotlight slider in the book is demonstrated. The narrator's speech rate is moderately fast. (4) As the interactive 'Mystery' book appears, a whimsical 'sparkle' SFX plays. The narrator's voice modulates to a higher pitch when emphasizing the 'solve puzzles' feature. Audible 'paper rustling' occurs as the book's flaps are opened. (5) During the pop-up city demonstration, a 'mechanical sliding' sound effect accompanies the helicopter's movement. A 'boing' cartoon sound effect marks a playful interaction. The BGM maintains a major mode, sustaining an upbeat and educational atmosphere. (6) The woman's voice returns for the call to action, peaking in volume and arousal. A series of celebratory 'ding' sounds occur as promotional text is listed. The music swells slightly before cutting off abruptly at the end.

The video ends with a clear commercial incentive involving limited-time group-buy discounts and bonuses.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys pose in a brightly lit lobby with large windows, standing in front of Crayon Shin-chan character statues and cutouts. One boy wears a fuzzy brown and white vest over a sweater and holds a yellow gift box while the other smiles broadly behind him. (2) The scene shifts to promotional posters and close-up views of ticket receipts for a museum event. A finished, large circular cookie with Crayon Shin-chan's face made of dark dough is presented. (3) The camera pans across a large indoor workshop area with rows of long yellow tables. Families are seated, working on various crafts in a high-ceilinged, well-lit studio environment. (4) A woman with dark hair helps the young boy at a table, using a white sanitizing wipe to clean his hands before they begin working with green and yellow dough balls on trays. (5) Multiple quick cuts show the boy and the woman using rolling pins, plastic templates, and a set of paper instructions to shape the dough into character faces. (6) While waiting, the boys are seen playing in a colorful play zone within the building, featuring large yellow pipe tunnels and interactive digital drawing screens. (7) A staff member wearing a blue shirt, mask, and black hat presents the freshly baked large cookie on a tray. The boy carefully slides the cookie into a yellow cardboard box with Crayon Shin-chan graphics. (8) The final scene takes place in a dimly lit restaurant at night. The boy sits at a table with hot pot dishes and takes large bites of the cookie while a woman across from him gives a thumbs-up gesture.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Four beige tickets with intricate retro sunburst patterns are held up by a hand with red nail polish against a bright blue sky. In the background, the entrance gate of an amusement park features large billboard-style posters of Ultraman and retro-style cartoons under bright sunlight. (2) A small, single-story octagonal brick building labeled as a police station stands next to a walkway; a woman in a pink coat and a man stand near the ticket booths. (3) A young man in a vibrant orange-red fleece jacket and black pants walks away from the camera through a long, covered outdoor shopping arcade designed in a 1960s Japanese style, featuring wooden storefronts and vintage lanterns. (4) Close-up shots show wooden shelves filled with colorful, retro-packaged snacks and candies. A hand with red nails touches circular white bags shaped like vinyl records displayed on a wooden rack. (5) Two young boys, one wearing glasses and a tan jacket, are seen dialing a vintage pink rotary telephone placed on a pedestal in front of a wooden building. (6) Costumed performers, including a man in a purple kimono and two women in yellow and pink 1950s-style waitress dresses, engage in animated street performances for a crowd. (7) A lively parade passes through the arcade with a man in a police uniform waving, a man playing a saxophone, and a small blue three-wheeled utility vehicle decorated with flowers and posters. (8) A montage displays various amusement park rides: children driving green go-karts, the man and boy riding a carousel with a large frog and ostrich, a red miniature train traveling through greenery, and a large octopus-themed ride. (9) The man and boys are seen on a drop tower ride called 'Little Angry God,' waving to the camera as they descend. (10) A boy in a grey sweater runs up a wide concrete staircase toward a large classical-style building named 'Sunset Pavilion.' Inside, a female staff member in a vest and bowtie greets them at the entrance. (11) The group enters a restaurant designed to look like a vintage train car with dark wood paneling, green upholstered seats, and video screens simulating moving scenery through the windows. (12) A waitress in a mask pushes a metal cart toward their table. A close-up reveals a plated meal featuring a hamburg steak with red sauce, a fried shrimp, broccoli, and a mound of yellow rice with a small flag on top.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an outdoor urban setting during bright daylight. A woman with a ponytail, wearing a black and white striped shirt and cream-colored cargo pants, is pushing a black stroller across a zebra crossing. Beside her, two young children in matching striped outfits are walking. Another stroller with a green storage bag is partially visible in the foreground. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor studio or living room with warm lighting and wooden wall panels. The same woman, now in a pink 'Haha baby' t-shirt and shorts, stands between two strollers: a black and red Jeep stroller on the right and a black GB Pockit stroller on the left. She gestures toward them with her hands, pointing out features while maintaining a smiling expression. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the wheels of the Jeep stroller. One wheel is a standard double-wheel design, while the other is a larger, rugged '3D' wheel with visible treads. The camera stays static as text overlays appear to explain the wheel's stability on rough surfaces. (4) The woman demonstrates folding the Jeep stroller. She squats down, using her foot to press a lever at the back. The frame of the stroller collapses forward and then folds in half vertically. She shows that once folded, the stroller can stand upright on its own against a white wall. (5) Transitioning to the GB Pockit stroller, the woman is seen pushing it back and forth in the indoor setting. Visual cues like shaky lines and text 'Shaky' are added to illustrate that this model is less stable than the Jeep one. She grips the handlebars tightly while moving it. (6) A quick cut shows the woman outdoors pushing one of the children in the GB Pockit stroller across a tiled plaza. The child is sitting and looking at a brochure. The lighting is harsh natural sunlight, and the background shows modern city buildings. (7) Back indoors, the woman demonstrates folding the GB Pockit stroller. This process involves pressing buttons on the handlebars and folding the wheels inward. The final folded state is much smaller and more compact than the previous model, resembling a small rectangular parcel. (8) A macro close-up shows the woman's hands engaging a plastic buckle to lock the folded GB stroller. Her movements are precise, showing how the parts click together. (9) The woman shows a zipper on the back of the stroller seat. She pulls the zipper open to demonstrate the reclining function, which allows the seat fabric to slacken for a sleeping child. (10) A final outdoor scene shows a young boy sleeping comfortably in the reclined stroller seat under the shade of its canopy. The woman's hand is visible on the handlebar as she pushes him gently. (11) The video concludes with a side-by-side product showcase of both strollers standing alone against a white wall with brand names 'JEEP' and 'GB POCKIT' appearing as large titles.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A boy wearing a red and blue striped shirt sits on a tiled floor, using a white electric hand mixer to stir a bowl of pale yellow batter. To his left, a small child in a white shirt sits watching. To his right, another boy in a green and blue striped shirt assists. An adult woman in a white tank top sits behind them, holding a small blue and yellow bowl. The setting is a brightly lit modern kitchen with light wood cabinetry. Red Chinese text appears at the bottom. (2) The boy mixing the batter looks down and begins to laugh, squinting his eyes and opening his mouth wide. The camera zooms in slightly as the text '竟然!!' appears in bold red characters. The woman leans in closer to see what happened. (3) A digital rewind effect is applied to the footage, with the text '倒帶' and rewind icons appearing in the center. (4) The camera provides a close-up insert shot of the yellow batter. A single small, black, round object is visible stuck to one of the mixer's beaters. A white comic-style speech bubble appears with the text '這是什麼?'. (5) From a higher side angle, the boy continues mixing. A red arrow appears, first pointing to his mouth and then to the black pearl in the batter. Yellow and red captions explain the situation. A laughing emoji and '好噁心' text appear in the corner. (6) The boy tilts his head back in hysterical laughter, his hands still holding the mixer as the woman continues to assist.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-definition close-up of a braised pork trotter, showcasing its glossy, deep brown skin and tender interior, held up by wooden chopsticks. In the blurred background, several more trotters are simmering in a thick, mahogany-colored sauce within a modern light-pink cooking pot. (2) A new phase shows the kitchen setup: an empty ceramic pot filled with clear water sits on a clean white glass-top stove. Tiny bubbles are visible at the base of the pot as the heat begins to rise, indicating the start of the cooking process. (3) The scene shifts to the blanching stage where a pair of hands with polished white nails carefully places chunks of raw, pale-pink pork trotters into the now-simmering water. The skin of the trotters appears clean and firm, and the water starts to foam slightly upon contact. (4) After boiling, the hands use a white slotted ladle to remove the trotters, which have now turned an opaque greyish-white. They are moved to a yellow plastic colander under a sleek black faucet where cool water runs over them, removing impurities as the hands toss them gently. (5) The preparation continues on a dark, textured cutting board where a sharp knife is used to slice fresh ginger and chop long green scallions into three-inch segments. The lighting highlights the fresh moisture on the vegetables and the precision of the slicing motion. (6) The trotters are placed back in the clean pot. A glass bottle of Coca-Cola is uncapped and poured in, the dark liquid bubbling and fizzing as it covers the meat. This is followed by a plate of water, dark soy sauce from a bottle, and a sprinkle of white seasoning powder. (7) The final cooking phase starts as the chopped ginger and scallions are layered on top of the trotters. A glass lid with a red handle is placed over the pot, and the scene transitions to the pot boiling vigorously, with the sauce reducing into a rich, savory glaze that coats the meat perfectly.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a dimly lit nightclub with vibrant green laser beams scanning the room. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black sleeveless top, is the central figure, smiling and dancing while waving her hands in the air. The background is dark with faint purple ambient lighting and shadows of other clubgoers. (2) The scene shifts to a more crowded part of the club where the lighting turns to deep purples and reds. The woman and several other patrons are holding long, glowing purple foam sticks, waving them rhythmically to the beat of the music. Their facial expressions are filled with excitement and energy as they jump together. (3) Multiple quick cuts show the group dancing together, with high-contrast cinematic lighting and strobe effects illuminating their faces. The background features large LED screens displaying abstract geometric patterns and brand names like DOKKAEBI. The camera moves in a handheld, shaky fashion to match the chaotic energy of the environment. (4) A more interactive sequence follows where club staff or friends are seen pouring alcohol from a large, red-glowing bottle directly into the mouths of the party-goers. The woman and her friends are seen laughing, with their eyes squinted and mouths wide open as they receive the drinks. (5) The group gathers for a toast, clinking small shot glasses at the center of the frame. The camera captures close-up shots of their hands and glasses, while the surrounding environment remains dark but filled with neon accents and the silhouette of the DJ booth. (6) The final sequence is a montage of different people in the crowd giving thumbs-up gestures or posing for the camera with happy smiles. The editing speed increases, matching the high-tempo EDM music, ending on a high-energy group shot of everyone cheering toward the lens.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a shot of the entrance to KidZania in Tokyo, featuring a prominent 'Chocolate House' sign with red glowing neon characters. Two young boys in yellow hoodies walk towards the door. The interior is brightly lit with warm artificial lights and brick walls. (2) A pricing board is displayed on a screen, showing admission fees for different age groups and time slots. A 3-hour pass (16:00-19:00) is circled in red. The background shows a white ticket counter and a large blue and white ANA airplane cabin part. (3) The scene cuts to various occupational settings. The two main boys are seen sitting in a lounge, then dressed in blue police uniforms with helmets, and later at a metal table with molding tools. A hand enters the frame holding a yellow job schedule card. (4) Multiple short clips follow showing the kids in diverse uniforms: green courier outfits carrying boxes, red aprons and caps while preparing pizza dough in a commercial kitchen, and blue mechanic jumpsuits near a red car with spare tires on shelves. (5) The kids participate in simulated work: making gachapon toys, spraying real water from nozzles as firefighters, and wearing lab coats in a Yakult-branded science laboratory. The backgrounds are meticulously designed to look like real-world storefronts and professional facilities. (6) Further scenes include the boys at an Autobacs car service station, a gas station with pump dispensers, and outside a Mos Burger. They are also seen in a beauty studio with mirrors and a shoe factory with digital design tablets. Lighting is consistently bright and clinical. (7) A close-up shows a hand holding a 'KidZania' 10-dollar bill. The kids then ride a yellow 'Hato Bus' sightseeing vehicle through a simulated city street. The video ends at an SMBC bank counter where the boys interact with a female staff member wearing a mask.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing black headphones and a white shirt over a black inner top, is seated in a luxury airplane cabin. She smiles and speaks directly into the camera lens with a joyful expression. The cabin environment behind her features light beige walls with a subtle pattern and a glimpse of other passengers. (2) A close-up shot shows a hand with brown-painted nails holding a red and blue business class luggage tag from Emirates against a colorful patterned bag. The scene transitions to a man wearing a dark beanie and a white sweatshirt sitting in a spacious airplane seat, holding a glass of yellow juice and giving a thumbs-up. (3) The camera pans down to show the legroom area under the airplane seat, where a pair of white slippers are neatly placed in a dedicated storage cubby. The scene then shows the woman lying fully flat on the reclined airplane seat, covered by a grey quilted blanket, holding up a peace sign. (4) A hand is shown interacting with various seat controls on a wood-grain side table, followed by a close-up of a small reading light being turned on. Another hand points to a wireless charging symbol on the wooden surface next to a glass of juice, indicating the tech amenities available. (5) The woman holds up several amenity items including blue slippers, an eye mask, and a set of grey pajamas, explaining their material. She then presents a pair of premium noise-canceling headphones with a wooden finish on the ear cups, while a flight attendant in a suit is visible in the background aisle. (6) The sequence shifts to dining, starting with a flight attendant laying a crisp white tablecloth on the seat's fold-out table. Various food shots follow: pouring olive oil over a fresh salad, the woman and man eating from bowls, and close-ups of gourmet dishes including a steak with asparagus, a shrimp appetizer, and a rich chocolate cake. (7) The woman enters a large, brightly lit airplane bathroom with multiple mirrors, a marble-topped sink, and various luxury toiletries like perfumes and toothbrushes. She gestures to the space and demonstrates brushing her teeth in front of a ring-light mirror. (8) The video concludes with a black screen featuring a simple blue animated 'zzz' text in the center, signifying the end of the journey and sleep.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a montage of a young Asian woman in a grey silk-like robe with her hair in a messy bun. Yellow text overlays appear at the top center of the frame against the neutral background. (2) The scene shifts to an outdoor urban alleyway in Korea. The woman is now wearing a blue Adidas denim-textured track jacket and matching shorts over a white sports bra. She walks towards the camera with a high-energy attitude, gesturing with her arms and pointing at her face. The background consists of modern grey buildings, parked cars, and typical city street signage, with bright natural daylight illuminating the scene. (3) Inside a bright, modern medical clinic, the main character is seen interacting with staff and a friend. She sits at a desk cluttered with promotional brochures and a mirror, pointing at specific items on a Chinese-language menu. The lighting is bright and professional. (4) The final sequence shows the woman back in her grey robe, gesturing and listing items with her fingers, followed by a group of about eight women in a clinic lobby. They are all smiling, some wearing face masks, and most are making peace signs or V-signs towards the camera. The atmosphere is celebratory and friendly, set against the clean, upscale interior of the medical facility before ending with a group photo.

They are surrounded by bare trees and other skiers in the background under overcast skies. (2) The scene shifts to a sunny, clear day on a wide ski slope with mountains in the distance. The woman attempts to snowboard but falls multiple times – once face-first into the snow, once backward onto her seat, and once rolling over. The camera captures her struggling and laughing in a series of quick cuts. (3) A high-angle shot from a moving ski lift looks down at the groomed snow tracks below. The woman is then seen from behind, successfully maintaining her balance while snowboarding down the hill. She is moving at a moderate pace, surrounded by sparse evergreen trees on the mountain side. (4) The woman performs a series of controlled S-turns on the snowy slope. She follows verbal instructions, adjusting her posture by crouching and extending her arms. Other skiers and boarders are visible far in the background. The lighting is bright and natural with long shadows on the snow. (5) In a series of close-up and medium shots, the woman continues her descent with increased confidence and a visible smile. She maneuvers the board smoothly across the snow. The sun is high, creating a bright and vibrant winter atmosphere against the backdrop of snow-capped peaks and blue sky. (6) The video concludes with the woman sitting on her snowboard on the snow. She looks directly at the camera, smiling broadly and waving with one hand while the other rests on the ground. The background shows a wooden ski resort building and some distant snow-covered trees.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit airport terminal queue. A young woman with a brown ponytail, wearing a purple fleece jacket and a white surgical mask, is the focus. She is positioned behind a woman with short brown hair in a black sweatshirt. The woman in purple reaches into the side pocket of the black-clad woman's olive-green and brown backpack, stealthily extracting a pink passport holder and a white pouch. She grins widely at the camera, showing amusement while the victim remains unaware, continuing to face forward in the line. (2) A brief montage intercut occurs, featuring a close-up of an older woman with short black hair and a purple shirt, appearing distressed and speaking emphatically, followed by a shot of a suitcase wheel rolling over a toe. This is a comedic insert. Back in the airport, another young woman with glasses and a black mask, wearing a light blue striped button-down shirt, joins the scene. She gestures towards the queue and laughs heartily, holding a pink document. The background shows airport check-in counters and other travelers in various casual attire. (3) The woman in the purple jacket continues her playful theft. She reaches into the backpack's mesh side pocket and pulls out a red water bottle. She then moves to the main compartment, unzipping it slightly and taking out a blue circular pouch with a star pattern and various keycharms, including a plush white figure. Her movements are calculated but exaggerated for the camera. She tucks these items under her arm or into her own large grey shoulder bag. The lighting is consistent, bright artificial indoor lighting typical of an international transport hub. (4) The woman wearing the backpack finally notices the commotion. She turns around with a look of surprise that quickly turns into a joyful, embarrassed smile. She laughs and reaches for her red water bottle, which the woman in the purple jacket is now holding. A man in a bright yellow and red windbreaker with a green baseball cap stands nearby, smiling and observing the interaction. The group shares a moment of collective laughter as the 'stolen' items are revealed, and the video ends with the woman in the black sweatshirt looking at her open bag.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a green long-sleeved crop top and white wide-leg trousers standing in an indoor living room. In the background, a Christmas tree decorated with ornaments and a gold 'Merry Christmas' sign is visible on the left, and a green wreath hangs on the wall behind her. She holds a white t-shirt with large blue, yellow, and turquoise polka dots, gesturing animatedly with her hands while speaking with an expressive face. (2) The scene shifts to a medium close-up of the woman's hands working on a white circular table. She holds silver scissors with yellow handles and begins cutting the bottom hem of the polka-dot shirt into thin, even vertical strips. Her movements are precise as she focuses on the fabric. On the table, various other tools and the colorful shirt are visible under bright, warm indoor lighting. (3) The camera moves to a tight close-up of the woman's hands tying the cut fabric strips into knots along the bottom edge of the shirt. She uses her fingers, which have dark brown polish, to loop and pull the fabric tight, creating a long-fringe effect at the base. The background shows the lower branches of the Christmas tree and a white shelf with various plush character toys. (4) The woman is shown folding the shirt vertically and using red dashed line overlays on the screen to indicate where to cut next. She cuts through the neck and shoulder area to create the handles for the bag. The camera uses a mix of medium shots and close-ups to capture both her facial reactions and the physical transformation of the modified garment. (5) In the final phase, she braids three strips of the remaining shoulder fabric into thick handles and ties the ends securely. The video concludes with the woman holding the finished bag up to the camera, smiling broadly and modeling it by swinging it by the handles and then wearing it over her shoulder to show its functionality.

One girl wears a bright yellow sweatshirt with 'NICE' written on it, while her friend wears a dark green sweater with a lace collar. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a high-tech industrial knitting machine. White and gray yarn threads are fed into a moving carriage that slides rapidly back and forth across a horizontal bed. The lighting is bright and industrial, highlighting the mechanical precision of the needles and tensioners. (3) The two women hold up a completed panel of orange-knitted fabric with a complex diamond-patterned texture. They examine the quality and thickness of the material while standing in front of rows of automated knitting machines in a large factory hall. (4) An older woman is shown operating a circular linking machine. She carefully aligns the edges of red-knitted fabric onto individual needles on a rotating dial to join pieces together. The camera focuses on her focused facial expression and the steady movement of her hands. (5) A close-up shot shows hands using a small needle to manually tuck in loose yarn ends on an orange sweater. This demonstrates the hand-finishing process. The background is slightly blurred, focusing on the texture of the knit. (6) A large industrial front-loading washing machine is seen spinning rapidly, filled with soapy water and white foam. The camera pans back to show the women discussing the specialized detergents used for wool. (7) The camera pans across a large workspace where massive stacks of folded cream-colored sweaters are neatly organized on tables. A worker is seen in the background using a lint roller on a dark purple sweater, meticulously removing stray fibers. (8) A close-up shows a sewing machine rapidly stitching a small white brand label onto the neckline of a cream sweater. The label features a small brown bear logo. (9) A male worker uses a professional steam iron on a dark purple sweater spread out on an ironing table. Thick plumes of steam rise as he smooths out the fabric. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens at night on a large outdoor stage with industrial metal scaffolding. A woman with hair in two buns, wearing a white, yellow, and blue polka-dot dress with ruffles, stands next to a man with bright red hair. They both hold microphones and point excitedly toward the audience. A clear acrylic box containing orange tickets sits on a podium in front of them. The camera cuts to a dense crowd of people at night, many holding up glowing red crab-shaped balloons, cheering with their hands raised. (2) Transitions to daytime shots of a similar stage setup. A large screen displays a colorful animation of a cartoon character in a boat. The crowd is shown seated in an outdoor field. A close-up shows a child's hand reaching into the clear acrylic box to pick a lottery ticket. Back at night, three individuals stand on stage holding large placards showing images of the Apple iPhone 15 Pro and Apple Watch Series 9. Dancers in matching polka-dot dresses perform a synchronized routine. (3) Large, round, red and blue mascots with smiling faces dance on stage in front of a giant '2025 haha baby RUN' backdrop. A young boy in a denim jacket looks up in awe. Fireworks in red, green, and gold explode in the night sky behind a building with European-style architecture. A massive, brightly lit Ferris wheel spins in the background. The hosts return to the stage, laughing heartily and waving to the cheering crowd as thick white smoke bursts from machines behind them.
